methodsAttempted.query: site:plus.ac.at Salzburg University KI ChatGPT Prüfungen Studierende Richtlinie
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found an official September 2025 guide PDF for AI tools in theses, assessed work, and exams, plus official contextual PDFs and news pages.
Firecrawl search found a current official guide PDF, an official Senate recommendation PDF, and an indexed KI Studium und Lehre page that returned 404 during fetch verification.
German-language search confirmed the guide PDF as the most policy-specific public official source; other hits were news, research, course, or event pages.
robots.txt allows general crawling and disallows only /wp-admin/ for generic user agents; the staged crawl used public PDF and HTML URLs only.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery for Paris Lodron University of Salzburg found two policy-specific official PDFs on plus.ac.at. Claims are limited to those PDFs. The indexed KI Studium und Lehre page returned 404, and the Digital Dialogue page was treated as news/context rather than a direct policy source.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official plus.ac.at PDF, retrieved with HTTP 200 application/pdf and parsed as a four-page German guide dated September 2025 from the Vice Rectorate for Teaching and Students and Quality Management.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Empfehlungen des Senats betr. Regelungen zum Einsatz von KI in Curricula an der Universität Salzburg
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official plus.ac.at Senate PDF, retrieved with HTTP 200 application/pdf and parsed as a four-page German recommendation document for curriculum commissions.
The indexed official URL returned HTTP 404 during Firecrawl and direct HTTP fetch checks, so it was not used as evidence.

artifacts.sourceTitle: PLUS Digital Dialogue: Info-Session zur KI-Umgebung in der Lehre
artifacts.verificationNotes: Official news/event page describing an information session and AI teaching environment; rejected as a primary policy source because the guide and Senate PDFs provide direct guidance.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Firecrawl and direct HTTP fetch returned a Universität Salzburg 404 page for this indexed URL.
artifacts.notes: The page title appeared in search results, but the live source was unavailable and was not used for claims.

artifacts.evidenceSnippet: Die KI-Lösung im Bereich der Lehre beruht im Wesentlichen auf zwei Säulen: AcademicGPT ... AI Design Assistent ...
artifacts.notes: The page is official and relevant to available AI tools, but it announces an information session rather than setting assessment, thesis, privacy, or curriculum rules.

targets.sourceTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
Empfehlungen des Senats betr. Regelungen zum Einsatz von KI in Curricula an der Universität Salzburg

stopConditions: Stop if robots.txt disallows the target path.
Do not access intranet, login-gated, Teams meeting, or protected resource links.
Do not use official news or event pages as binding policy evidence when direct policy PDFs are available.

artifacts.errorReason: HTTP 404 Not Found; page was not used for policy claims.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
Empfehlungen des Senats betr. Regelungen zum Einsatz von KI in Curricula an der Universität Salzburg

artifacts.claimText: The University of Salzburg guide says teachers and thesis supervisors set, for each course, assessment, exam, or supervised thesis, whether and to what extent AI technologies may or should be used, and that these requirements for assessed work should be communicated transparently and in writing in advance.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The guide recommends specifying AI use along three levels: unrestricted use, use within a defined framework, or a general ban as an unauthorized aid.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For exams, the guide says AI-tool use is at the discretion of teachers; if no corresponding rule has been made, AI tools are unauthorized aids and are not permitted.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The guide advises against entering personal or copyright-protected data into freely accessible free AI tools and recommends the University of Salzburg licensed tools Microsoft Copilot in M365 or Academic AI.

citation.citationTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: The Senate recommendation says curriculum commissions may identify exams to be taken in secure environments or by analog means to prevent AI use, and may identify exams where AI instruments are useful or desired, especially using the university-licensed Academic AI.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Es wird empfohlen, die Zulässigkeit des Einsatzes von KI-Technologien entlang einer dreistufigen Definition festzulegen: Der Einsatz von KI ist ohne Einschränkung erlaubt. Der Einsatz von KI ist in einem definierten Rahmen erlaubt. Der Einsatz von KI ist als unerlaubtes Hilfsmittel generell verboten.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The guide recommends defining AI use as unrestricted, allowed within a defined framework, or generally prohibited as an unauthorized aid.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen in Abschlussarbeiten, beurteilungsrelevanten Arbeiten und Prüfungen
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Auch der Einsatz von KI-Werkzeugen bei Prüfungen liegt im Ermessen der Lehrenden. Wurde keine entsprechende Regelung getroffen, sind KI-Werkzeuge unerlaubte Hilfsmittel und daher nicht zulässig (§ 2a HS QSG).
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: For exams, AI-tool use is at teachers' discretion; if no rule was made, AI tools are unauthorized aids and not permitted.

artifacts.sourceTitle: Empfehlungen des Senats betr. Regelungen zum Einsatz von KI in Curricula an der Universität Salzburg
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: Die Curricularkommissionen können im Curriculum definierte Prüfungen identifizieren, die in einer sicheren Umgebung oder überhaupt mit analogen Mitteln abzulegen sind, um die Heranziehung von KI zu unterbinden. Sie können außerdem ... Prüfungen identifizieren, bei deren Ablegung eine Inanspruchnahme von Instrumenten der KI sinnvoll oder sogar erwünscht ist ...
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Curriculum commissions may identify exams to be taken securely or analog to prevent AI use, and exams where AI instruments are useful or desired.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a narrow guide-backed claim about course, assessment, and thesis-specific AI-use rules; not promoted as a canonical public claim.
Approved because the claim follows the guide's three-level wording and avoids overstating it as a binding university-wide default.
Approved as a direct exam-specific statement from the guide; source language preserves the mandatory wording.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling recommendation from the guide; the claim uses 'advises' and 'recommends' rather than a mandate.
Approved as a Senate recommendation about what curriculum commissions may identify; the claim is not framed as an already implemented curriculum rule.

artifacts.title: Paris Lodron University of Salzburg AI Policy Source Review
artifacts.summary: The staged crawl found two official Universität Salzburg PDFs with policy-specific AI guidance. The September 2025 guide addresses course and thesis-level AI-use decisions, a recommended three-level framework, exam default treatment when no rule is set, and privacy cautions for free AI tools. The Senate PDF provides curriculum-level recommendations for defining AI-related exam conditions. An indexed KI Studium und Lehre URL returned 404, and a Digital Dialogue news page was rejected as context-only.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The crawl did not access the university intranet or any login-gated handbook pages referenced by the public PDFs.
The indexed public KI Studium und Lehre page returned HTTP 404 and was not used as evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
